# HustleCoin (HSL)

> HustleCoin is a Telegram Mini App that gamifies consistent effort. Users mine HP (Hustle Points) daily, build streaks, complete quests, refer friends, and climb leaderboards — no wallet setup required, accessible directly inside Telegram.

## Key facts

- Product: Telegram Mini App, opened via the @HustleCoinMinerBot bot on Telegram.
- Core loop: daily mining of HP, streak multipliers for consecutive days, referral bonuses, one-time/recurring quests, global and referral leaderboards.
- HP has no guaranteed monetary value; any future token generation event is speculative and covered only by the public roadmap.
- Anti-abuse: multi-accounting, bots, and sybil referral networks are detected and penalized (HP wipe, account ban).
- No financial advice: HustleCoin does not offer investment guarantees.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hustlecoin.app/): product overview and live network stats.
- [About](https://hustlecoin.app/about): philosophy and commitments.
- [Features](https://hustlecoin.app/features): mining, streaks, referrals, leaderboards, quests, anti-bot mechanics.
- [Documentation](https://hustlecoin.app/documentation): how to get started and how each mechanic works.
- [Roadmap](https://hustlecoin.app/roadmap): development phases and status.
- [FAQ](https://hustlecoin.app/faq): common questions.
- [News](https://hustlecoin.app/news): announcements and updates.
- [Support](https://hustlecoin.app/support): help channels.
- [Contact](https://hustlecoin.app/contact): contact form and Telegram community link.
- [Privacy Policy](https://hustlecoin.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://hustlecoin.app/terms)

## Contact

Telegram community: https://t.me/HustleCoinMinerBot
